results.title: HKSAR V. CHEUNG KIM HO
results.coram: Before: Deputy District Judge May Chung
results.charge: Offence: [1]Burglary （入屋犯法罪） [2]Assaulting a police officer in the due execution of his duty（襲擊在正當執行職務的警務人員）
results.representations: Present: Mr Edward Luke McGuinniety, Counsel on Fiat, for HKSAR Mr David Boyton instructed by T K Tsui & Co, for the defendant
